channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WNBA Finals reach decisive Game 5 for first time since 2019 as Liberty and Lynx head to New York
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 13 BYU outlasts Oklahoma State to remain undefeated, winning 38-35 on TD with 10 seconds left
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AP) — Jake Retzlaff threw a 35-yard touchdown pass to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left and No. 13 BYU remained undefeated, outlasting Oklahoma State 38-35 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: JOHN COON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 Oregon routs Purdue 35-0, remains on top of Big Ten with first road shutout in over 30 years
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. (AP) — Oregon coach Dan Lanning challenged his team to see how it would respond to a long road trip on a short week following its 32-31 victory over then-No. 2 Ohio State last week. The No. 2 Ducks aced that test Friday night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees get to Guardians closer Clase again, score 2 runs in 9th to win 8-6 and take 3-1 ALCS lead
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Cleveland All-Star closer Emmanuel Clase gave up two runs in the ninth inning and the New York Yankees moved closer to another World Series, beating the Guardians 8-6 on Friday night to take a 3-1 lead in the American League Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims for a strong finish to regular season while honoring midfield hero Matt Crooks
item.description: Real Salt Lake (3-West, 56 points) closes out the regular season against Vancouver Whitecaps FC (8-West, 47 points) at America First Field in Sandy on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: First on PIX: NY Liberty's playoff run generates $18 million for NYC
item.description: BROOKLYN, N.Y. (PIX11) -- The New York Liberty's WNBA playoff run, including the ongoing championship series, has generated $18.3 million in economic impact for New York City.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: New Zealand needs one more win to retain America's Cup after building 6-2 lead over Britannia
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Emirates Team New Zealand built a 6-2 lead over INEOS Britannia in the America’s Cup finals on Friday to move just one point away from successfully defending the oldest trophy in international sport.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The Mets need their biggest comeback yet to reach the World Series
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Mets insist their greatest rebound of 2024 may be yet to come. “If we come back from this, then it’s going to be a heck of a story.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Don't count out the Mets just yet
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Whenever you have doubted the Mets this season, they have responded. They have done it all season, so there's no reason to believe they will not do it tonight against the Dodgers. They are trailing in the series by two games to one.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Cole Kmet earns NFC Special Teams Player of the Week honors
item.description: Cole Kmet was named NFC Special Teams Player of the Week for Week 6 after successfully snapping on all five of the Bears' point-after attempts during their game in London against the Jacksonville Jaguars.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Cam Rising's legacy marred by injuries
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Cam Rising will go down as one of the most successful quarterbacks in Utah history. Rising won 20 games over parts of three seasons, threw for 6,127 yards, 53 touchdowns, and led the Utes to back-to-back Pac-12 Championships and Rose Bowl appearances.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kucherov gets 4th goal of the season, Lightning beat Canucks 4-1 in Milton-delayed home opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored his fourth goal of the season, and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Vancouver Canucks in their hurricane-delayed home opener on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, AP sources say
item.description: The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning donates tickets to first responders; offers discounted tickets for first 3 home games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning donated tickets to hundreds of first responders, other recovery workers, and their families following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty wins first PGA event at Black Desert Championship
item.description: IVINS, Utah (AP) - IVINS, Utah (AP) — Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears TE Cole Kmet catches 2 of Caleb Williams' 4 TD passes, handles long snaps in 35-16 rout of Jaguars in London
item.description: WATCH: Jarrett Payton loves what he's seeing from the Bears' offense in the attached video from Monday's WGN Morning News. LONDON (AP) — Chicago Bears tight end Cole Kmet faced his biggest fear in football with no notice. In a snap, you might say.
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks beat Oilers, 5-2, for first win of 2024-25 season
item.description: EDMONTON, Alberta (AP) — The Blackhawks will go into the final game of their season-opening road trip with win on their ledger.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
